heading: Retention of records
label: 2909 Retention of records
text: The Archivist may empower a Federal agency to retain records for a longer period than that specified in disposal schedules, and may withdraw disposal authorizations covering records listed in disposal schedules. The Archivist shall promulgate regulations in accordance with to implement this section.section 2104(a) of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 395(f) (, title V, § 505(f), as added , ).June 30, 1949, ch. 288Sept. 5, 1950, ch. 849, § 6(d)64 Stat. 583

L. 108–383section 2104(a) of this title1984— substituted “Archivist” for “Administrator of General Services”.Pub. L. 98–4971970— struck out “approved by Congress” after “disposal schedules” in two places.Pub. L. 91–287
